deep_dive.title: CoeusBI: A Comprehensive Interactive Business Intelligence System Powered by LLMs at Baidu [Extended Version]
deep_dive.abstract: The advent of Large Language Models has catalyzed the emergence of interactive Business Intelligence (BI) systems. Although commercial BI products increasingly adopt semantic layers paired with natural language interfaces, they predominantly rely on manual configurations to define metrics and dimensions. Real-world deployments face critical challenges: (a) frequent JOIN operations degrade the accuracy of SQL generation; (b) wide schemas exacerbate the challenge of schema linking; and (c) the generation of dialect-specific queries and the accurate support for multi-round dialogues incur high computational costs and yield limited accuracy. We introduce CoeusBI, an industrial-scale interactive BI system that addresses these barriers through a novel Dual-Agent Architecture paired with a Hierarchical Schema Linking module: (1) an offline View Generation Agent that utilizes error-feedback to autonomously convert complex JOIN queries into simple single-view queries, which eliminates the need for manual semantic modeling; (2) a Hierarchical Schema Linking module that leverages vector retrieval over views to handle exceptionally wide schemas efficiently; and (3) a dynamic Routing Agent that evaluates dialogue contexts to route queries, dynamically invoking either the synthesis of new intermediate representations or targeted modifications of existing ones, before compiling the unified representation via a deterministic SQL compiler that is agnostic to dialects. Extensive experiments on both public datasets and production datasets demonstrate that CoeusBI achieves significant improvements in query accuracy, token efficiency, and user satisfaction relative to existing methods. CoeusBI is deployed as a standalone service on the data platform of Baidu and is widely used across multiple business lines supporting thousands of users daily, thereby evidencing strong practicality and scalability.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM-based BI system with multi-round dialogue support for financial/business analytics, a task-oriented financial agent
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于LLM的BI系统，支持多轮对话进行财务/商业分析，属于任务型金融智能体
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于LLM的BI系统，支持多轮对话进行财务/商业分析，属于任务型金融智能体
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于LLM的BI系统，支持多轮对话进行财务/商业分析，属于任务型金融智能体
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces CoeusBI, an industrial-scale interactive BI system that tackles SQL generation, schema linking, and multi-round dialogue challenges, delivering accurate business insights via natural language.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 介绍百度工业级交互式BI系统CoeusBI，通过解决宽表Schema链接、频繁JOIN的SQL生成及方言适配和多轮对话等挑战，实现自然语言驱动的精确商业数据分析，是金融领域任务导向智能体的典型代表。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 介绍百度工业级交互式BI系统CoeusBI，通过解决宽表Schema链接、频繁JOIN的SQL生成及方言适配和多轮对话等挑战，实现自然语言驱动的精确商业数据分析，是金融领域任务导向智能体的典型代表。

deep_dive.title: State-Grounded Multi-Agent Synthetic Data Generation for Tool-Augmented LLMs
deep_dive.abstract: Training tool-augmented LLM agents requires large corpora of multi-turn, tool-grounded conversational data that is expensive to annotate, privacy-constrained in production settings, and largely absent from public datasets. We present StateGen, a synthetic data generation platform that produces scored, reasoning-trace-rich training conversations by orchestrating a four-role LLM loop: a persona-conditioned user simulator, an agent under test, a state-grounded tool simulator, and a multi-axis LLM judge. The key architectural contribution is an authoritative state manager that maintains a structured world-state object across turns, enforcing a backend-is-truth invariant that eliminates the dominant class of tool-call hallucinations by construction. StateGen extends naturally to hierarchical multi-agent settings by declaring sub-agents as tools, all sharing a single state object. We report results on 64,698 evaluated conversations across three production corpora: tool-call hallucination scores reach 9.66/10, the system supports persona-driven variation via a 23-dimensional trait vector, and a cleanly separated train and golden evaluation set split confirms the data is not memorization bait (per-criterion gap analysis). Comparison with eight external systems shows that no single publicly available platform combines multi-turn generation, state-grounded tool simulation, hierarchical multi-agent support, and built-in judge scoring.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Multi-turn tool-grounded conversational data generation for training agentic LLMs, directly applicable to financial dialogue systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于训练智能LLM的多轮工具对话数据生成，可直接用于金融对话系统
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于训练智能LLM的多轮工具对话数据生成，可直接用于金融对话系统
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于训练智能LLM的多轮工具对话数据生成，可直接用于金融对话系统
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents StateGen, a platform that generates high-quality multi-turn tool-grounded dialogues via a four-role LLM loop with authoritative state management, eliminating tool-call hallucinations and providing rich training data for tool-augmented agents.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 提出StateGen平台，通过用户模拟器、被测智能体、状态驱动工具模拟器和多轴评判器的四角色循环，结合权威状态管理器维护结构化世界状态，生成无幻觉的多轮工具对话数据，为训练工具增强型多轮对话智能体提供高质量合成语料。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 提出StateGen平台，通过用户模拟器、被测智能体、状态驱动工具模拟器和多轴评判器的四角色循环，结合权威状态管理器维护结构化世界状态，生成无幻觉的多轮工具对话数据，为训练工具增强型多轮对话智能体提供高质量合成语料。

deep_dive.title: Connect the Dots: Training LLMs for Long-Lifecycle Agents with Cross-Domain Generalization Via Reinforcement Learning
deep_dive.abstract: This work presents a general framework for training large language models (LLMs) to "Connect the Dots" (CoD), a meta-capability required by long-lifecycle agents: as an LLM-based AI agent gets deployed in an environment, it solves a long sequence of tasks while continuously exploring the environment, learning from its own experiences, and iteratively self-updating its context about the environment, thereby achieving progressively better performance on future tasks conditioned on the updated context. Major components of the CoD framework include: (1) algorithm design and infrastructure for end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) with long rollout sequences interleaving solve-task and update-context episodes; (2) tasks and environments for incentivizing and eliciting the targeted meta-capability in LLMs during training, as well as for faithfully measuring progress during evaluation. We present proof-of-concept implementations of the CoD framework, including a GRPO-style RL algorithm with fine-grained credit assignment, as well as tasks and environments tailored to the targeted meta-capability (rather than domain-specific LLM capabilities or standard task-by-task RL). Empirical results validate the efficacy of end-to-end RL training in the CoD setting, and demonstrate the potential for out-of-distribution generalization -- within the training domains, across different domains, and from CoD to Ralph-loop settings -- of the elicited meta-capability. Our investigation of CoD connects several lines of prior works, and opens up new opportunities for advancing LLMs and AI agents. To facilitate further research and applications, we release our implementations at \url{https://github.com/agentscope-ai/Trinity-RFT/tree/research/cod/examples/research_cod}.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes RL-based post-training for autonomous agents with long rollouts, directly matching techniques for post-training of autonomous agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出基于强化学习的自主智能体后训练方法，包含长轨迹回放，直接匹配自主智能体后训练技术。
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出基于强化学习的自主智能体后训练方法，包含长轨迹回放，直接匹配自主智能体后训练技术。
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出基于强化学习的自主智能体后训练方法，包含长轨迹回放，直接匹配自主智能体后训练技术。
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: To endow LLM agents with lifelong learning, the paper proposes CoD, an RL framework with interleaved task-solving and context-update episodes. It enables agents to explore, learn from experience, and self-improve over long horizons. Experiments show cross-domain generalization and progressively better performance, offering a general post-training recipe for autonomous agents.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对LLM智能体在长期部署中缺乏持续学习和自我改进能力的问题，提出CoD框架，通过强化学习实现交替执行任务与更新内部环境上下文的长轨迹训练。实验表明，该方法使智能体具备跨领域泛化能力，在未来任务中表现逐步提升，为自主智能体的后训练提供通用范式。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对LLM智能体在长期部署中缺乏持续学习和自我改进能力的问题，提出CoD框架，通过强化学习实现交替执行任务与更新内部环境上下文的长轨迹训练。实验表明，该方法使智能体具备跨领域泛化能力，在未来任务中表现逐步提升，为自主智能体的后训练提供通用范式。

quick_skim.title: SpecAlign: Efficient Specification-Grounded Alignment of Large Language Models via Synthetic Data
quick_skim.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, alignment is no longer governed by a single universal notion of safety or helpfulness, but instead by provider- or application-specific model specifications. These specifications are typically long, structured, and frequently updated, yet existing alignment pipelines lack a systematic mechanism to operationalize them as training signals. In this paper, we propose specification-grounded alignment, a new alignment paradigm that treats provider-authored model specifications as the primary alignment target rather than abstract principles or static benchmarks. To instantiate this paradigm, we introduce SpecAlign, a framework that synthesizes alignment data directly from specification documents. SpecAlign combines structured rule annotation, controllable specification instantiation, and multi-agent adversarial data synthesis to generate fine-grained, boundary-aware preference pairs that capture both compliant behaviors and meaningful specification violations. Experiments across multiple model specifications and backbone models demonstrate that training with SpecAlign consistently improves rule compliance while preserving general capabilities and avoiding over-conservative behavior. These results suggest that grounding alignment in explicit model specifications enables rapid, precise, and scalable adaptation of LLM behavior to evolving policy requirements.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Specification-grounded LLM alignment via synthetic data, a post-training alignment approach applicable to financial agents
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过合成数据实现基于规范的大语言模型对齐，是一种适用于金融智能体的后训练对齐方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过合成数据实现基于规范的大语言模型对齐，是一种适用于金融智能体的后训练对齐方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过合成数据实现基于规范的大语言模型对齐，是一种适用于金融智能体的后训练对齐方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SpecAlign aligns LLMs using provider-authored specs via synthetic data, enabling efficient, updatable alignment for domain-specific agents.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 为应对现实应用中多变的模型规范，SpecAlign提出规范驱动对齐新范式，将提供商规范作为对齐目标而非抽象原则。它通过合成数据生成对齐训练样本，高效实现规范到模型行为的映射。实验证明该框架能灵活适应规范更新，为金融等垂直领域的大模型对齐提供了实用工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 为应对现实应用中多变的模型规范，SpecAlign提出规范驱动对齐新范式，将提供商规范作为对齐目标而非抽象原则。它通过合成数据生成对齐训练样本，高效实现规范到模型行为的映射。实验证明该框架能灵活适应规范更新，为金融等垂直领域的大模型对齐提供了实用工具。

quick_skim.title: CoffeeBench: Benchmarking Long-Horizon LLM Agents in Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Economies
quick_skim.abstract: As LLM agents become capable of increasingly long-horizon tasks, evaluating their performance in economic systems is becoming increasingly important. Unlike existing benchmarks that primarily evaluate a single agent interacting with a passive environment, economic systems are inherently multi-agent, requiring autonomous agents to communicate, negotiate, and transact while pursuing their own objectives over extended periods. We introduce CoffeeBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents in a long-horizon multi-agent economy composed of heterogeneous firms. In CoffeeBench, two farmers, two roasters, and two retailers autonomously operate their businesses over a 90-day simulation, each seeking to maximize cumulative net income through communication and transactions while managing cash, inventory, and pricing. The evaluated model controls one coffee roaster, while the remaining firms are controlled by fixed reference agents. Across several recent open-weight and proprietary LLMs, all models outperform a passive baseline that takes no actions, with most achieving positive net income. Analysis of agent behavior reveals substantial differences in long-horizon economic interaction: higher-performing models communicate more actively with other firms, whereas Claude~Haiku~4.5 exhibits an idle-drift failure mode, repeatedly choosing inaction despite producing coherent assessments and plans. We release our code and agent trajectories to support future research.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Evaluates LLM agents in autonomous multi-agent economic tasks, directly relevant to financial task-oriented agents.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 评估LLM智能体在自主多智能体经济任务中的表现，直接关联金融任务导向智能体。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 评估LLM智能体在自主多智能体经济任务中的表现，直接关联金融任务导向智能体。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 评估LLM智能体在自主多智能体经济任务中的表现，直接关联金融任务导向智能体。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces CoffeeBench, a benchmark where LLM agents operate businesses in a 90-day simulation, evaluating long-horizon planning, negotiation, and economic decision-making. It addresses the lack of realistic multi-agent economic environments for agent evaluation, showing that current agents struggle with strategic multi-turn interactions, thus providing a critical testbed for developing financial AI agents.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有LLM智能体基准测试缺乏真实多智能体经济环境的问题，提出CoffeeBench，模拟两周农民、烘焙商和零售商企业在90天内的自主经营与交易。实验表明，当前智能体在长期策略规划和多轮协商中仍面临巨大挑战，该基准为金融领域智能体的开发和评测提供了关键测试平台。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有LLM智能体基准测试缺乏真实多智能体经济环境的问题，提出CoffeeBench，模拟两周农民、烘焙商和零售商企业在90天内的自主经营与交易。实验表明，当前智能体在长期策略规划和多轮协商中仍面临巨大挑战，该基准为金融领域智能体的开发和评测提供了关键测试平台。

quick_skim.title: The Value Axis: Language Models Encode Whether They're on the Right Track
quick_skim.abstract: We investigate whether language models internally track the value of their current trajectory, defined as the likelihood that their ongoing strategy will achieve their goals. Using synthetic, in-context reinforcement learning data, we construct a "value" axis for Qwen3-8B. We find that activations along this axis distinguish between high vs. low verbalized confidence, rollouts without and with backtracking, and correct vs. corrupted code. Steering towards high value causally suppresses self-correction and reduces explanatory verbosity, while steering towards low value induces backtracking and exploration. We demonstrate that direct preference optimization (DPO) can increase the internal value of rewarded behaviors (e.g. use a certain word), causing the model to act more confidently after exhibiting them. Finally, we apply the value axis to study in-the-wild settings. For example, we find that Qwen assigns low value to politically sensitive chat queries after post-training and that supervised fine-tuning increases internal confidence within the training domain. Our results suggest that language models linearly encode an estimate of expected goal success that modulates their confidence in pursuing a direction.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Shows DPO can steer internal value axis, a method relevant to fine-tuning and alignment of LLM agents
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 展示DPO可操控内部价值轴，是与大模型智能体微调对齐相关的方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 展示DPO可操控内部价值轴，是与大模型智能体微调对齐相关的方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 展示DPO可操控内部价值轴，是与大模型智能体微调对齐相关的方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: The paper identifies a value axis in LLMs that tracks strategy quality, and shows DPO can increase internal value, providing a mechanism for alignment.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 为理解语言模型在推理中是否追踪策略质量，本研究在Qwen3-8B中构建价值轴，发现激活模式可区分不同行为，且通过DPO能增强被奖励行为的内部价值。操控该轴可调节自我修正和探索，揭示对齐技术对内部表征的影响，为精准控制模型行为提供了机械性证据。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 为理解语言模型在推理中是否追踪策略质量，本研究在Qwen3-8B中构建价值轴，发现激活模式可区分不同行为，且通过DPO能增强被奖励行为的内部价值。操控该轴可调节自我修正和探索，揭示对齐技术对内部表征的影响，为精准控制模型行为提供了机械性证据。
